title: Vegetables Fruits Detection
description: Detect 17 types of fruits and vegetables in camera images
long_description: This project allows you to train a YOLOv8n-based model to identify fruits and vegetables in camera images. The dataset covers 17 produce classes and is suitable for smart kitchen, retail, and industrial IoT applications on Infineon edge devices.
